blocks.content: Eli showed up at Kit's locker in late September with his laptop bag over one shoulder and the energy of someone who had discovered something.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: It's the future. Also Marcus is on it. Also half the junior class. Also I've already customized my profile.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You made a profile before you told me what it was?

That night Eli sent Kit the link and Kit spent forty-five minutes on it, which was thirty-five minutes longer than he'd planned. You picked a song for your profile. You had a top eight — eight people you listed, in order, publicly, for everyone to see. The social implications of the top eight alone kept Eli occupied for a week.
Kit made a profile because Eli made him. He put Eli first in his top eight because Eli would notice the order, and then Daisy, and then left the rest blank.
He picked a song. He didn't think too hard about which one.
anyway daisy just made a profile
